name: codesk-control
description: Fast native macOS control for Codex using text state, keyboard shortcuts, Accessibility actions, and screenshot fallback. Use Codex Web, Browser Use, or DOM tools for browser page work.

interface.shortDescription: Control native macOS apps through text and shortcuts
interface.longDescription: Codesk Control gives Codex a CLI-first native macOS control path. It inspects the front app as text, sends native keyboard shortcuts, pastes text, activates apps, selects menus, presses Accessibility elements, and falls back to screenshots only when needed. Browser page work belongs to Codex Web, Browser Use, or DOM tools.
defaultPrompt: Control browser chrome when explicitly needed
Use the current app through shortcuts
